acfun_download_by_vid: Download an Acfun video by its vid, dispatching to the appropriate extractor based on sourceType and optionally saving danmaku.

Arguments:
    vid (str): video id to download.
    title (str): title for the output files.
    output_dir (str): directory to save downloaded content; defaults to '.'.
    merge (bool): whether to merge audio/video streams; defaults to True.
    info_only (bool): if True, only fetch and print information without downloading; defaults to False.
    **kwargs: arbitrary keyword arguments; may include 'caption' (bool) to indicate whether to download danmaku captions; other keys are accepted but ignored.

Returns:
    None: performs downloads and writes metadata as side effects.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: raised when the detected sourceType is not supported.
